mapper.sql: sid, bid, quantity, minQuantity, status, updateTime
mapper.insert: insert into stock (sid, bid, quantity, minQuantity, status, updateTime) values (#{sid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{minQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into stock
sid,
bid,
quantity,
minQuantity,
status,
updateTime,
#{sid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{bid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{minQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update stock
bid = #{bid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
minQuantity = #{minQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where sid = #{sid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update stock set bid = #{bid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, minQuantity = #{minQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where sid = #{sid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update stock set quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status = case when #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER} <= #{minQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER} then 0 else 1 end where bid = #{bid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
select
from stock order by updateTime desc

select
from stock where quantity < minQuantity order by quantity asc
mapper.update:
update stock set status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, updateTime = now() where sid in
#{sid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select s.sid, s.bid, s.quantity, s.minQuantity, s.status, s.updateTime from stock s join book b on s.bid = b.bid where b.bname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') order by s.updateTime desc
